text.tspan: A SKILL is a folder + a markdown file with frontmatter.
Portable across agent harnesses (Claude Code, pi, etc.).
Loaded on demand by description matching, not all-at-once.

g.text: How the agent loads it (progressive disclosure)

text.tspan: should be loaded. Used by the
agent's router to match user intent.
The actual SOP for the agent:
1. At startup: scan ALL skill descriptions (cheap, small).
2. On user query: match description to intent.
3. Load matched SKILL.md body into context.
4. As needed: load scripts/, templates/, reference.md.
This is PROGRESSIVE DISCLOSURE - only pay for what's relevant.
